disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels ‘blindsided’ and ‘misled’ by new quarantine orders - CNN
updates.body_en: American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels ‘blindsided’ and ‘misled’ by new quarantine orders CNN American Hantavirus Patient Ordered to Stay in Quarantine Despite Plans to Leave The New York Times Hantavirus update: CDC confirms 2 brought to Omaha facility ordered to quarantine WOWT
